dc:title: Person with loaded bicycle on shaded rural road near Isola Farnese
dc:description: A person stands near the center of a sunlit dirt or gravel road bordered by dense trees and undergrowth. The person's face is obscured or blurred; they wear a sleeveless top, cropped trousers, socks, and shoes. To the right, a bicycle is parked against vegetation and appears fitted with bags and travel equipment. A chain-link fence and a posted sign are visible on the right side; the sign includes Italian text reading in part, "PROPRIETÀ UNIVERSITÀ AGRARIA DI ISOLA FARNESE." The road recedes into a shaded tree-lined passage, with strong contrasts between sunlight and shadow across the foreground.
condition_note: Colors unverified; image programmatically inverted from faded source negative.
